question: Are Required Minimum Distributions modeled in v1?
options: Yes — IRS RMD table on tax-deferred accounts
context: Depends on 9032d3c9 (improve out of the gate) and the v1 tax model decision. Tax-deferred bucket is rollover IRAs (8a2f4e15), which are subject to RMDs from age 73/75; forced taxable income interacts with bracket model.
